titleStmt.title: SII 15.73: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 73. (B.K. No. 145 of 1926-27.) HOṀBAḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in the temple of Śaṅkaraliṅga.

The record is dated the 3rd regnal year of the king, Saumya, Śrāvaṇa śu. 10, Monday, Saṅkramaṇa. The date corresponds to 1189 A.D., July 24. But there was no Saṅkramaṇa on that day. The regnal year cited would yield 1187 A.D., as the initial year of the king which is rather too late.

It registers a gift of land made by the teacher Rudraśakti of the Kāḷāmukha order after purchasing it from the One Hundred and Twenty Mahājanas of Pombuḷcha for worship and offerings in the temple of Kumāra-Bontēśvara constructed by him in the agrahāra of Poṁbolal in memory of his preceptor Vāmaśakti. The record describes a line of teachers of the Kāḷāmukha sect in the Beḷḷeya-santāna and Parvatāvaḷi as follows: Bonteyamuni to whom are attributed several miracles one of which is said to have been performed in the court of Jayasiṁha-Chakravarti. His chief disciple was Avadhūta who had the following junior colleagues, Kēdāraśakti, Mallikārjuna, Mūṟujāvi, Nirvāṇayōgi, Vāmadēva or Vāmaśakti, Siddhēśvara, Rudraśakti and Kriyāśakti. Vāmaśakti had three disciples, viz., Bonteyaguru, Mallikārjuna, and Rudraśakti, the donor. Various other gifts made to the same deity on the same occasion by the local artists, Aṟuvattokkalu, merchants, etc., are also recorded. Poṁbuḷcha and Poṁboḷal occurring in the inscription are the earlier forms of the name of Hoṁbaḷ. The epigraph is also interesting on account of its literary merit.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśirascuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . yasyōnmēṣanimēṣābhyāṁ jagataḥ praḷayōdayē .
taṁ śakticakravibhavaṁ prabhavaṁ śaṁkaraṁ numaḥ . vritta . Idu bhūdēviya cenna poṁnamakuṭaṁ tāneṁbinaṁ peṁpuvettudadhivyāvritamāgi
śōbhisuva jaṁbūdvīpa madhyapradēsadoḷoppirppudu mēru mēruvina teṁkalu bhārata kṣētramirppudu tadbhāratavarṣadoḷsogayisirkkuṁ kuṁtaḷōrvvītaḷaṁ . Adu
cāḷukyara janmabhūmiyadaṟoḷu muṁ puṭṭi satyāśrayādi diḷīpōpama cakravarttigaḷanē karddhātriyaṁ dharmmadiṁ paduḷaṁ pāḷisutirdu pō
da baḷikīgaḷtaṁna sauryyavaḷēpadinī dhātriyaneydepāḷisidapaṁ sōmēsvarōrvvīśva raṁ kaṁ . kuvaḷayamaṁ tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēsvaraṁ karaṁ nijakaradiṁThis letter is written below the line
da vikāsamappinaṁ pāḷivettu pāḷisutumiṟdaniḷe pogaḷvinagaṁ . © svasti samastabhuvanāśra yaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka śrīmaccāḷukya cakravartti tri
bhuvanamallavīrasōmēśvaravijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . vṛtta . vasudhege bhūribhūdharapayōdharegujvaḷadēvadīrgghi kāvasanege kuṁtaḷākritiyenirppudu kuṁtaḷadēśavalli śōbhi
suvudu beḷvalaṁ tiḷakadaṁtadaroḷkamanīyakāntiyaṁtesadu mahāgrahāramenisirppudu poṁboḷalūrjjitōrjjitaṁ . kaṁda . Adu celvina neleyenisirppudu muṁnaṁ nōḷpajanake baḷikirppa janarkkadu sukhadā
karamenisirppudu poṁboḷalagrahāracūḍāratnaṁ . va . Adeṁteṁdaḍe . vṛtta . baḷadoṟagiṟda keyvolada karvvina tōṁṭada pūgoḷakke barppaḷigaḷa pūta saṁpageya kāyteḷadeṁgina paṇta māvinutkaḷikeyanāṁta kōgileya poṁba
ḷavotte kavuṁginoppamaggaḷisire poṁboḷalvoṟavūḷaltaḷadoppadinoppi tōṟuguṁ . matta madu . vṛtta . navasaṁgītadinoppi tōrppa sivagēhabrātadiṁ laṁjikānivahakkrīḍeyaṁ nānta harmyacayadiṁ vistārakānēkavastuvi
śēṣaṁgaḷoḷoṁdidaṅgaḍigaḷiṁ paurāṁganāmaṁgaḷavyavasāyaṁgaḷinantaraṁgadoḷavoppirkkuṁ karaṁ poṁboḷalu . mattamadu . vritta . vēdaninādapūritadiśāvaḷayaṁ kritamaṁga ḷābhiśēkōdakapāvanāvanitaḷaṁ makhahōmasamu
ttha dhūmasaṁpādita kāḷimāṁkitenabhasthaḷameṁdumideṁdu biccataṁ mēdini mecci baṇnipudu poṁboḷalaṁ neredagrahāramaṁ . vṛtta . Adaroḷu nūrirppadiṁbarssadamaḷacaritāḷaṁ kritarvviśvavidyāvidarudyatkīrtticaṁcadhvajararikuḷahṛ
tkīḷa vajrānanarssatyadayādharmmāśrayarssaṁśrita sakalajanādhārarirpparmmahāpuṇyada bījaṁgaḷsamaṁtondeḍeyoḷa neredirppaṁdadiṁ lōkapūjyaru . kaṁda . Avarivarannade kayyāṁtavargīvarmmaṟege vandaraṁ kāvarkkāyva
varaṁ kiḍiparvvarṇnisa bhuvanaṁ nūṟippadimbaremba mahātmaru . vacana . Iṁtu bhūmiyoḷu bhūmisāramuṁ prabhusāramuṁ dharmmasāramumāgi mahāgrahāraṁ peṁpuvettiḻdudu kaṁnda . Antenisida poṁboḷalo
ḷu boṁteyamuni kāḷamukhamunīsvaranatiniściṁtātmanāgi beḷḷeya santānaṁ negaḷda parvvatāvaḷiyirppaṁ . va . Ā kaliyuga siddhalakuḷīśvarāparanāmadhēyanenisida mahānu bhāva prabhāvadoḷe doreyēnendaḍe . vritta . ©
© śrīgiriyoḷpodaḷduriva sūryyaśiḷātaḷadoḷnidāghadoḷu bēge taguḷdu nāldeseyoḷaṁ suḍe niścaḷacittanāgi sūryyāgamanakke sanmukhadinūrdhvamukhaṁ nile keyyanetti kaṇḍāgaḷe sūryyanittu sakaḷajñateyaṁ muni
boṁtegaḻkaṟiṁ . kaṁda . nuḍikartṟuvādamaṁ toḍarddaḍe dēvamanuṣyayakṣarākṣasaroḍa nādaḍavoṁdanugrahaṁ geydaḍe dinapaṁ paḍedanalte bonteyamunipa . vacana . Antu paḍedu sakaḷasāmarthyabharitanuṁ śiva
dharmmaniratanumāgi . vritta . barutuṁ parvvatadiṁde poka� deyaṁ liṁga pratiṣṭhārtthama baradoḷkiccurivaṁtu nirddaḷidu hōmaṁ geydu vidviḍadharāmararaṁ kay�ugivaṁtu māḍi śivaliṁgasthāpanaṁ geydanaccariyappaṁtu
jagakke boṁtayamunīṁdraṁ viśvalōkastutaṁ . Adalladeyuṁ . vṟitta . karahaḍadoḷbaruttu mire . bhikṣege baṭṭeyoḷorvvanuddhataṁ surigeyanāṁtutūgi hiḍi bhikṣeyaneṁdi ṟivante geyvuduṁ ka
ragi rasaṁbholā surige pātrayoḷirdaḍe pīrddu pōdanaccariyane lōkavēṁ piriyanō muni boṁtaya dēvanājñeyoḷu . va . Adalladeyuṁ . kaṭakadoḷvihārisuttuṁ jayasiṁha dēvara maneyoḷcakravartrige
purōvarttiyūgirppa samayadoḷu . vritta . parasamayaṁgaḷoḷnegaḻda tārkkikarellaru mirddu nīṁ narēśvaravibhayoḷsamartthisuva karttruvarūpamadeṁtuṭenda nūrvvaroḷamanitta rūpenisi nindu niruttararā
gi māḍi bittarasidanalte boṁteyamunīśvara nīśvara kartruvādamaṁ . va . Aṁtu cakra varttiya sabheyoḷsakaḷasamayanirākaraṇamukhadiṁ kartruvādicakravartiyeṁba pesaraṁ pettu matta
mā rājadhāniyoḷu yōgīśvaraṁ boṁteyaguru vihārisuttuṁ bare . kaṁda . madakariya nēṟi barppavanidiroḷu kaṁḍelele boṁteya kaṇḍeya nīyeṁbudu mikke neladoḷadanā mada kari baṁdetti muḷgi
biḷdudu dhareyoḷu . va . Ādalladeyuṁ mattamormme tīrtthayūtrānimittaṁ nānā dēśaṁgaḷoḷvihārisuttuṁ bandoṁdu divasaṁ . kaṁda . ceriyisutuṁbare kollāpuradoḷmuni boṁta bhikṣeyaṁ jōgi
ṇi kāydurivaṁ baliyaṁ piḍiyene pariharisede koṁḍu kuḍidaḍavaḷurideṟdaḷu . va . mattamanē kavismayūvahaṁgaḷappa prabhāvaṁgaḷiṁ varttisuttumirddoṁdu samayadoḷu . vṛtta . pariharisalke bāradu śubhāśubhaka
rmamanuṁḍaḍallade doreyarumeṁbudaṁ jagake bicca tamūgire pēḷva mūḷkeyiṁ jvaramoṭage taṁdu tannoḷire kaṁtheyoḷaṁtadanikki dēvatāsmaraṇeyoḷirddanēṁ piriyanō guru bonte tapaṟprabhāvadoḷu . kaṁda . bē
ṟūri rasātaḷadūḷaṁ dhāriṇiyoḷmoḷetu desegaḷoḷu taḷtu nabhakkōraṁte miḷirdu baḷevuda hōrātraṁ kīrttilatike būṁteyamuniyaṁ(ya) . vacana . Intu negaḷtevettu . kaṁda . nirupamarenisida boṁteya gurugaḷgaṇimādi guṇagaṇānvita
rgge manōharanenisi sakaḷavidyāpariṇatanavadhūtadēvanādaṁ śiṣyaṁ . va . Ā mahānu bhāvaṁ . kaṁda . piṁgade naṟuguṁdadoḷaṁ gaṁgeyoḷaṁ grahaṇakāladoḷcariyise lōkaṁ gaṁgeyayyanene negaṟdaṁ guṇiyavadhūta
dēvanabhinavavibhavaṁ . prativādinivahadīpapratatipradhvaṁsavipuḷajhaṁjhūvātaṁ kritamatiyava dhūtaṁ viśrutavākpati kartruvādimukhamukuruṁda . Iṁtu negaṟtevetta . vritta . Anavadyaṁ
gavadhūteyōgiganujarkkēdāraśakti prabhāvanidhānaṁ nutamallikārjjunanudāttaṁ mūṟu jāvibratīṁdranaghaughacchidudāttamārgganirataṁ nirvvāṇayōgīśvaraṁ janavaṁdyaṁ yati vāmadēvananaghaṁ yō
gīśanāmāṁkitaṁ . kaṁda . nayamārgaṁ siddhēśvaranayaniyamaṁ rudraśakti sakaḷakaḷā saṁśrayanūrjjitaṁ kriyāśaktiyivarttāvādarakhiḷaguṇasaṁsēvyaru . vacana . Iṁtavadhūta dēva pramukha
śiṣyasaṁsēbyamūnapādāraviṁdaruṁ . parivritamunīṁdrabṛṁdarumāgi . kaṁda . śrijiyi sidarssakaḷaguṇabrajamaṁ taṁdoṁdu māḍi kaṁthācāryyarnnijamahimeyinosede savaṁtu jagaṁnutanenipa vāma
śaktibratiyaṁ . vritta . Oḍavuṭṭiddakhiḷāgamaṁ sakaḷatarkkaṁ śabdaśāstraṁ peṟarppoḍavaṭṭā gaḷe cittadoḷbageda mātaṁ pēḷva vijñānadoḷu nuḍiyārādhise sūryyanoḷpaḍeda tatvā bhyāsamā taṁdeyoḷpaḍiyeṁ
baṁtire vāmaśaktiyesadiḷdaṁ kartṛvādīśvaraṁ . vṛtta . parasamayaṁgaḷoḷnegaḷda tarkkada mātuḍugittu kūḍe catvaravaṭhadēvatābhavanarājagrihaṁgaḷoḷolda māḷkeyiṁ niravisi pēḷva nāṭakada
kābyada nītiya balmeyallaroḷpariharisittu vādimukhadarppaṇaniṁ sale vāmaśaktiyiṁ . vṛtta . bratadīkṣāvidhikuṁḍamaṁḍaḷavidhānaṁ liṁgapīṭhakramaṁ pratimādūṣaṇapōṣaṇaṁ bhuva
nakōśaṁ vāstu bhūdayvasaṁsthiti bhūbhēda parīkṣe dēvanivahaprāsādameṁbāgamasthita vidyāvaḷi vāmaśaktimuniyiṁ vikhātya māyturvviyoḷu . vacana . Iṁtu sakaḷavidyā saṁpannaruṁ bhāktikajana pra
saṁnaruṁ . kartṛvādīśvararuvārādhitaviśvēśararumenisi negaḷtevetta vāmaśaktidēvarggaura sa putrarenisi . kaṁda . janiyisidarbbonteyaguru manumārggaṁ mallikārjjunaṁ sakaḷa kaḷābhinutanamarēśvaraṁ pāvanacari
taṁ rudraśaktiyeṁbarttanayaru . kandha . Ā vāmaśaktidēvarggāvirbhavisirdda sutaroḷagrima sutanurvvīnutakīrtti sakaḷakṣmāvaniyoḷu rudraśaktidēvaṁ negaḷdaṁ . vritta . gurukuḷavā
rddhivarddhanasudhākaranātmakuḷōllasatsarōvaravararājahaṁsanagajāramaṇāgamaśaiḷakēḷikē sari viṣayāvaḷiprabhavamōhamahālatikālavitranandorevudu rudraśaktimuni
puṁgavanaṁ dhare meccibiccataṁ . vṛtta . hareyada rūpinēḷgeyoḷamubbaṭeyiṁ tapameṁdu kāypiniṁ smaraniradeydi pūgaṇege kaydare bhōṁkene tattapōgni nibbaramaṟeyaṭṭi muṭṭi suḍe biṭṭabhimānamanō
ḍi pōdanī dhare nage taṁnanā negaḷda rudranenuttama rudraśaktiyaṁ . vritta . rasavarggatyāga mēkāṁtaravuṇasaduvaṁ mūru tuttalliyuṁ bhūtasamūhakkoṁdu bhāgaṁ baliyane nega
ḷdīghōravīraṁ tapaṁ māṇise durvvārēṁdriyōdrēkamanavicaḷitēkāgracittaṁ samaṁta rccisi niccaṁ rudraśakti bratipati paḍedaṁ rudranoḷu taṁna meccaṁ . vṛtta . gurudharmmā caraṇaṁ dayā
nuśaraṇaṁ prāgbhūtaduḥkarmmasaṁharaṇaṁ saṁśritasādhuvargabharaṇaṁ viśvēśvarāṁghridvayasmaraṇaṁ sarvvajanōpakārakaraṇaṁ nōḷpāgaḷī yāṟuvābharaṇaṁgaḷsale rudraśakti munipaṁgoppi
ḷduvī dhātṛ(tri)yoḷu . vacana . Iṁtu sakaḷaguṇabharitanuṁ . vairāgyaniratanuṁ . śivapada bhaktanuṁ . bhaktānuraktanene negaḷtavettirddu . kaṁde . guru vāmaśaktidēvara parōkṣavina yakke rudraśaktimu
nīśaṁ haraliṁgasthāpanamaṁ dhare baṇnisuvaṁtu māḍidaṁ poṁboḷaloḷu . va . Antu prati ṣṭheyaṁ māḍi kumārabontēśvarameṁdu pesariṭṭu . vritta . Udayisidātmavaṁśamadu pāvana miḷda guhādridēva
tāsadanavanāḷi pāvanataraṁ sale meṭṭida bhūmisasyasaṁpadavati yormme muṭṭida jaḷāśaya vūrjjita tīrtthameṁba peṁpodavire rudraśaktimuni tāḷdidanapratimaprabhāvamaṁ . vacana . Ā mahā
nubhāvana tapaḥprabhāvaprādurbbhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . vritta . kṣame tannoḷu mūrttigoṁḍuṁ nati baḷedu nayaṁgoṁḍu mikkārppu kaykoṁḍu mahatvaṁ biṇpugoṁḍu prabhuteyanoḷa koṁḍīśatatvaṁ manaṁgoṇḍa
maḷa śrīkūrmmegoṁḍujjvaḷa ghanayaśamaṁ tāḻdikoṁḍintu lōkōttamanādaṁ vāmaśakti bratipatitanujaṁ rudraśaktibratīṁdraṁ . vṛtta . paramajñānadhanaṁ tapōdhananabhīṣṭārttha pradānaṁ dhanaṁ sthi
rasatyaṁ dhananūrjjitabratadhanaṁ śāṁtatvadoḷtaddhanaṁ varamārggaṁ dhananīśatatvadhananudyettēja vādaṁ dhanaṁ dhare mōkṣaṁ dhananeṁdu baṇnisuvudu śrī rudraśaktīśanaṁ . Aṁgajana pratāpa dodavaṁ neṟe bhaṁ
gisi tannoḷāda saṁgaṁgaḷa vāṁccheyaṁ toradumiṁdriyavarggada bērakittu mōhaṁgaḷe pāśamaṁ paridu cittadoḷīśananoldu tāḻdidaṁ jaṁgamarudranurvvareyoḷorvvane boṁtaya rudraśaktigaḷ . vri .
tīrcci parōkṣadoḷpitṛge māḍuva satkriyeyaṁ virakti meyverccire saṁgamaṁ toṟedu pādukamaṁ balavaṁdu bhaktiyiṁdarccisi keṅgaṇabbeya padaṁgaḷanāgaḷe rudraśakti baṁdarcci sutiḷdanaṁdu naṟugundada beṭṭadoḷiddu sū
ryyana . vṛtta . Uriyanuguḷva bēsageyoḷiḷduṟe kāydaṟeyoḷbaḷikke permmara moda loḷkeḷalda maḷegāladoḷiḷdu baḷikke śītamabbarisida māgiyoḷbayaloḷiddu nirāvaraṇaṁ niraṁnanuddhuratapadiṁ trivarṣami
re kaṁḍinanā muni rudraśaktiyaṁ . kaṁda . dhareyoḷśivāgamaṁ vistarisire palargaṟiye pēḷdu śivapadapūjāparanāgaṇimādigaḷoḷu neredapenīnandinantirōhitanādaṁ . kaṁda . tadanaṁtaravudi yisa bōdhadīpti tadgi
riya durggiyaṁ bīḷkoṁḍu manōmudadiṁ cariyisutiddaṁ sudarśanaṁ rudrasaktidēvaṁ jagadoḷu . © Ā mahānubhāvanappa rudraśaktidēvaṁ śrīmanu mahāgrahāraṁ poṁbu ḷcadaśēṣamahā
janaṁ nūṟirppadiṁbarumaṁ dharmmārtthaṁ prārtthisi drabyanivēdanaṁ geyyalavarddhāre sahitaṁ kuḍalu paḍedu śrīmaccāḷukyacakravartti tribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēśvaradēvavarṣada mūṟeneya
saumyasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa suddha 10 sōmavāra saṁkramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu śrī kumāra bontēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōganaivēdya khaṇḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ sarvvabādhāparihāraṁ sarvvanamaśyamāgi
biṭṭabhūmiya pramāṇa Ūra kōla samakaṭṭinoḷūriṁ baḍagaṇa poleyamageṟeyiṁ baḍagaṇa narasiṁhadēvara keyiṁ baḍagalumpaḍuvaluṁ beḷvoḍeya holada mēreyiṁ mūḍalu poḷdirddamatta
rippattanālku yiṁtī dharmmamaṁ nūṟirppadiṁbaruṁ svadharmmadiṁ kāydu pratipāḷisi naḍasuvaru . © śrīrudraśaktidēvarā puṇyadinadalu beḷvoḍeya Ūroḍeya rāyarasena maga kāḷimarasa
numaṁ . Ammarasana maga rāyarasenumaṁ . dharmmūrtthaṁ prārtthisi dravyanivēdenaṁ geyyala varu śrī kumāra boṁtēsvaradēvaraṁgabhōga naivēdyakkeṁdu sarvvanamasyaṁ sarvvabādhā parihāramā
gi śrīmadaśēṣamahājanaṁ nūṟirppadiṁbara saṁnidhānadalu śrīrudraśaktidēvara kālaṁ kaḷci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa bhūmiya pramāṇameṁteṁdaḍe hoṁboḷala kōla samakaṭṭi noḷāvūra ho
lada mēreyiṁ paḍuva kīrttyādityadēvara keyiṁ baḍaga mattarāṟu . Intī dharmmamaṁ nūṟirppadiṁbaruṁ pratipāḷisi naḍesuvaru © Iṁtī vrittiyaṁ rudraśaktidēvara sikṣeya makkaḷu
śrī kumāra boṁtēśvaradēvargge biḍisidavaradāreṁdaḍe navilūra saṁkarabbe . kavaḍara cendi seṭṭi meyyalommattaru . mūlaramūraṇa mattereraḍu . dhāravāḍada kabbaḷamūkayya matta reraḍu . kabbaḷa kalla
yya mattaroṁdu . baysara billaṇa mattaraidu Ubbajiyara kallayya temma cendayya . teneyara . guḍḍaṇa . taṁmana samaṇa . niṭṭila siṁgaṇa . jaridara nāgaṇa . kaṇṇiyara kētaṇa . kaluvara kallaṇa . sinda
vaḷḷiya teraḷiya lakumaṇa . naragara gaurave . naragara caṁdagāvuṁḍa . heḍavaraicaṇa . kēsaḷara javanaṇa . māsiyaraicaṇa . baḷagāṟa kētaṇa . sāsala hogarara nāraha . karmmāṟaicōja . navilguṁdadujvaḷaballeya nā
yakanintivarallaṁ meyyaloṁmattaraṁ biḍisidaru . © mattamū puṇyadivasadalu sarvva jaṇōpakāravappa vyavasāyigaḷenisida poṁbuḷcadaṟuvattokkaluṁ vokkalaloṁdu māḍa hoṟe baṇnigegoḷagamaṁ biṭṭar .
Ūra taḷavāra nāyakaṁ mukhyamāgiyāḷaloṁdu hoṟeyaṁ biṭṭaru nakaraṁgaḷu caitradalu hāga pavitradalu hāga saṭṭuga bhatta dēvara vīḷeyakkaṁgaḍiyaloṁdaḍake yeraḍeleyaṁ biṭṭar .
haṁnavaṇagaru caitradalu bēḷa pavitradalu bēḷeyaṁ biṭṭaru . kaṁcagāṟaṟu dēvarupakaraṇaṁgaḷellamaṁ kūliyaṁ koḷḷade māḍi kuḍuvaṁtāgi biṭṭaru . maḍivaḷarellaṁ vokkalaloṁdu hoṟeyaṁ
biṭṭaru . kuṁbāṟarokkalaloṁdāvage galanaṁ biṭṭaru . mattamā puṇyadivasadalūre taḷavāra nāyakaṁ tannalli khaṇḍugabhattamumanāḷalayguḷa bhattamaṁ biṭṭaru . Ālada sēṇi garu caitradalu hāga
pavitradalu hāgamaṁ biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
